title: Hello Baby Pink Confetti Cannon - Perfect for Gender Reveals & Baby Showers - 1 Pc
features: BEAUTIFUL PINK COLOR: Our confetti cannon is filled with stunning pink confetti that will create a dazzling explosion of color in the air, perfect for revealing that it's a girl and making memorable photos to cherish for a lifetime.

HIGH-QUALITY PAPER MATERIAL: Made from eco-friendly, biodegradable paper confetti, our cannon not only provides a striking visual effect but also ensures easy cleanup and a guilt-free celebration, because we care about the environment as much as you do.

PERFECT FOR GENDER REVEALS: Designed specifically to enhance your gender reveal and baby shower experience, capture the unforgettable reactions of friends and family when the pink confetti fills the air.

EASE OF USE: No assembly or batteries required - simply twist the bottom of the cannon and watch the pink confetti soar into the sky, creating an unforgettable moment for all your guests. It's user-friendly for all ages to enjoy.
CELEBRATE IN STYLE: Unveil the gender of your little one with hello baby pink confetti cannon, designed to make your baby shower or gender reveal party an unforgettable event.
description: Product Description Start your celebration with a bang with this fun party cannon featuring pink and gold tissue shape confetti which is biodegradable and safe to use. This is party cannon is great to simply mark that special moment during your Baby Shower Party. This is a must-have for your Baby Shower celebration. Directions 1. Remove the confetti cannon from its packaging. 2. Ensure a clearance of at least 2.5 meters for indoor use. 3. Twist the bottom of the cannon to release the confetti. 4. Use the cannon to mark special moments during a baby shower party. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 14 years old See more
